Metadata.title: Next.js Starter Kit
Metadata.description: A Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Neon Postgres quick-start template

Home.title: Next.js Starter Kit
Home.subtitle: A template for starting development right after cloning — just drop in your requirements.

getStarted.title: Get started
getStarted.description: Copy .env.example to .env.local, fill in your Neon connection string, then run npm run dev.

ui.title: Tailwind CSS v4 · shadcn/ui
ui.description: base-nova preset · base-ui primitives · lucide icons

db.title: Neon Postgres · Drizzle ORM
db.description: Server-only access path · pooled/direct split · scale-to-zero

test.title: Vitest · Testing Library
test.description: Unit tests in jsdom · jest-dom matchers

theme.title: Dark mode · next-themes
theme.description: Class-based theme toggle · follows system setting

i18n.title: Internationalization · next-intl
i18n.description: Korean as the baseline · English also supported · path-prefix routing
